claims.text: The invention claimed is: 1. A method of treating Veno-Occlusive Disease (VOD) comprising administering to a patient in need thereof a defibrotide formulation consisting of defibrotide, sodium citrate...

use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS WITH HEPATIC VENO-OCCLUSIVE DISEASE (VOD), ALSO KNOWN AS SINUSOIDAL OBSTRUCTION SYNDROME (SOS), WITH RENAL OR PULMONARY DYSFUNCTION FOLLOWING HEMATOPOIETIC STEM-CELL TRANSPLANTATION (HSCT)
